audit_summary.summary_text: The 'command-development' skill is a comprehensive, well-structured educational resource for creating Claude Code slash commands. It provides detailed guidance on command structure, YAML frontmatter, dynamic arguments, file references, bash execution, and plugin-specific features. The skill content is aligned with its stated purpose of teaching command development. No malicious patterns, hidden instructions, exfiltration commands, or credential harvesting logic were detected. The skill is purely instructional and does not contain any code that would execute harmful actions.
